APPEARANCES: FOR DEF. & X-COMPLAINANT AND FOR DEF. & X-DEFENDANT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING-1)3RD CAUSE OF ACTION, EXPRESS INDEMNITY OVERRULED. ALLEGATIONS RESPECTING MOU SUFFICIENT ALLEGATIONS OF AGREEMENT TO SUPPORT CLAIM FOR EXPRESS INDEMNITY. 2)DEMURRER AS TO 4TH AND 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION OVERRULED ON SAME GROUNDS. ALLEGATIONS OF AGREEMENT RE MOU SUFFICIENT. 3)DEMURRER BASED ON STATUTE OF FRAUDS OVERRULED. LANGUAGE OF COMPLAINT BY ITSELF DOES NOT INDICATE IT PERFORMABLE FOR MORE THAN ONE YEAR.
